x y z w : ℕ
ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z
hw : 0 ≤ w
h0 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑x = 24
h1 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑y = 40
h2 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = 12
⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
have hx : 0 < x := by linarith [ht.1]
  have hy : 0 < y := by linarith [ht.2.1]
  have hz : 0 < z := by linarith [ht.2.2]
  have hw' : 0 < w := by linarith [hw]
  rw [Real.log_mul hx.ne', Real.log_mul hy.ne', Real.log_mul hz.ne', add_div, add_div] at h2
  rw [← h0, ← h1] at h2
  field_simp [hx.ne', hy.ne', hz.ne', (Real.log_pos hw').ne'] at h2 ⊢
  linarith
